LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER ORDER DENYING PEOPLE'S MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY CARNELL R. TAYLOR ONLY AS TO THE FURTHER ORDER TO RETURN FUNDS TO CARNELL R. TAYLOR (CCP SECTION 1008(A)). RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: THE PRIOR ORDER OF THE COURT SHOULD BE MODIFIED TO REFLECT THAT MR. TAYLOR HAS FILED A VERIFIED CLAIM TO THE PROPERTY AND THE PARTIES ARE ENTITLED TO A HEARING AS TO THE OWNERSHIP OF THAT PROPERTY. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Reconsider Order Denying People's Motion To Strike Claim Opposing Forfeiture Filed By Carnell R. Taylor Only As To The Further Order To Return Funds To Carnell R. Taylor (CCP SECTION 1008(a)).
APPEARANCES: Pamela A. Underwood, Asst District Atty 551-9544 for petitioner & moving party; Carnell R. Taylor, 374-1702, claimant & opposing party in propria persona.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: The prior order of the Court should be modified to reflect that Mr. Taylor has filed a verified claim to the property and the parties are entitled to a hearing as to the ownership of that property. Moving party to prepare proposed order. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
